'''Ore Boulevard''' was a alley disguised as a minor [[Magma/Legends|lava]] tube in [[ChikatLik]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. The walls of the alley were adorned with both flat and holographic advertisements for various attractions, exhibits and vendors. The [[X'Ting]] [[Crime lord/Legends|gang leader]] [[Trillot]] had a [[Trillot's facility|facility]] in a corridor off Ore Boulevard.<ref name="TCD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
